name: Green Genie Pawn Shop
description_short: Green Genie Pawn is a pawn shop in Oklahoma City offering collateral-based loans, buy/sell/trade services for jewelry, firearms, electronics, and musical instruments.
description_long: Green Genie Pawn operates as a traditional pawn shop located at 9201 N Council Rd in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma County. The business is listed on the Hubbiz directory and serves the local Oklahoma City market with standard pawn shop services. The company accepts a wide range of collateral items including jewelry, firearms, electronics, musical instruments, and other merchandise. Their service model follows the typical pawn industry approach of providing quick cash based on item collateral, with the ability to purchase outright or engage in trade transactions. Green Genie Pawn distinguishes itself by accepting a diverse inventory—from estate jewelry and antique items to modern electronics, guitars, and long guns—suggesting they serve both casual sellers and specialty collectors. The business lists capabilities across ammunition, gunsmithing, and firearms handling, indicating some specialization in those categories. Without published customer reviews on their listing, their reputation cannot be independently verified through the available data. The company appears to be an independently operated local pawn shop rather than a chain operation, which may appeal to customers preferring local business relationships over corporate entities.
address: 9424 N Council Rd, Oklahoma City, OK 73162

pros: No credit checks required for collateral loans, making access available to those with poor or no credit history
Wide variety of accepted collateral items including jewelry, firearms, electronics, guitars, and motorcycles
Offers buy, sell, and trade options, providing flexibility beyond simple loans
Specializes in estate jewelry and antique items, appealing to collectors and those liquidating valuables
Provides gunsmithing services, indicating specialized expertise beyond basic pawn operations
Local, independently-operated business in Oklahoma City rather than chain operation
cons: No customer reviews available on listing to verify service quality or loan terms
No published information about interest rates, loan terms, or redemption policies
Limited online presence and no detailed website beyond basic directory listing
No information about typical loan amounts, pawn periods, or fee structures
Cannot verify current inventory, hours of operation, or service availability from provided data
best_for: Individuals needing emergency cash without credit checks or bank approval
Collectors or estate sellers looking to liquidate jewelry, firearms, or antique items
Musicians or audio enthusiasts wanting to buy, sell, or trade instruments and equipment
People seeking local alternatives to larger national pawn chains
diagnosis: Green Genie Pawn is best suited for borrowers needing fast cash based on collateral or individuals liquidating items, particularly jewelry, firearms, or musical instruments. The primary caveat is the complete lack of published information about loan terms, rates, fees, and redemption policies—borrowers should contact directly to verify these critical details before engaging their services.
meta_description: Green Genie Pawn in Oklahoma City offers collateral-based loans and buy/sell/trade for jewelry, firearms, electronics, and instruments.
